title: 🔑 Better Keys 🗝
description: Makes Trial and Dungeon keys looks prettier and a little more ominous
body:
![Better Keys Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24d40aa119202dd62d62c111ccdfa91936e05700.png)

**Makes the Trial Keys have a new shape and visual to be more charming, unique, and ominous
inspired by old Origin Realms crate-keys credits to them**
---

![Keys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db4467dc6ef27c2d01bb4da32f6eff9834315c0d.png)
Compatible with [Dungeons And Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) as well
